[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111100 5
1 1100101 4
2 1001110 4
3 1111010 5
4 1110111 6
5 0000011 2
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

01 10 0110100 3

67 76 0000011 2 match 5
70 07 0000010 1

71 17 0000000 a match 6 7

72 27 0000000 a match 6 7
